column1: # Example campaign task list (TSV, tab-separated). ONE row = ONE
# `python -m trace_collect.cli` invocation. Lines starting with '#' and blank
# lines are skipped.
# columns:  task_id <TAB> benchmark <TAB> extra_cli_args
#   task_id        human label used for logs/<task_id>.log and PID identity.
#   benchmark      plugin slug (swe-rebench | terminal-bench). The runner
#                  APPENDS `--benchmark <benchmark>` to the command, so do NOT
#                  put --benchmark in extra_cli_args.
#   extra_cli_args everything AFTER `python -m trace_collect.cli` EXCEPT
#                  --benchmark, copied from the arm's `invocation:` block in
#                  configs/recording_campaigns/agent_event_kv_step_level.yaml.
# The runner prepends `python -m ${TRACE_CLI_MODULE:-trace_collect.cli}` and
# appends `--benchmark <benchmark>`. Verify the expansion before deploying:
#   bash scripts/campaign/run_campaign.sh run --tasks scripts/campaign/tasks.example.tsv --print-cmd

# Placeholders

(provider) and (model) are filled per deployment. Arm C's
